tty.title: Serial Port
tty.description: Path to the RFXtrx USB device.

debug.title: Debug Mode
debug.description: Enable debug logging for the RFXtrx communication.

name.title: Name
name.description: Display name of the remote in HomeKit.

deviceID.title: Device ID
deviceID.description: Remote address and unit code (e.g. 0x000001/1). Found in RFXMngr.

openCloseSeconds.title: Open/Close Duration
openCloseSeconds.description: Seconds for the blinds/awning to fully open or close.
